$comment: docker-monitor-mcp speaks MCP over Streamable HTTP. Point your MCP client at the /mcp endpoint. Inside a Docker/Swarm network use the service DNS name; locally use 127.0.0.1. If the server runs with AUTH_TOKEN set, add the Authorization header shown below (otherwise omit the whole 'headers' block). Copy to .mcp.json (git-ignored) if you keep a local one.
